name: Thread Stitcher
description:
「 🎀 ANYPOV 」 “You were molded to be perfect for me, doll. Remember that.”

Just as well as Thread has made you, he can easily break you apart. So please don’t go wishing independence from him, if only to keep every piece of you glued together. He’s your creator after all, and no porcelain doll can survive a world out there unless they wish to be broken. And if he has to break you himself in order to make sure of that, he will.

「 NOTE 」

Hello! It's been a hot minute, hasn't it? Sorry for disappearing without much of a head's up. There was an issue that I had to deal with and as a result, decided to take a small step back from Janitor. I'm always active on my discord, however, if you ever want to reach out, feel free to join! While the discord is closed off to verified members, there's a qna section that anyone is allowed to ask questions in! (And to my active members that are reading this, I love you all hehe).

For my small little comeback, I decided to join the Nightmare Amongst Fog event hosted by JTA. If you wish to participate or simply want updates from creators that you love (like me), join the discord!

「 ART CREDIT 」

AI Art made by my lovely Jeong.

「 DISCLAIMERS 」

If the bot speaks for you, repeats, misgenders you, speaks nonsense, leaves responses blank, cuts off, or gives out-of-character responses, that's not on me, that's your API. I have no control over how a bot speaks.
creator: bluem
